'''''Redeye''''' was an [[Airam (group)|Airam]] starship. During the operations of [[Task Force Vengeance]] it was misfortunate enough to cross paths with Star Destroyer [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] and Interdictor Cruiser ''[[Compellor]]'' near the [[Blair Cluster/Legends|Blair Cluster]] where the two Imperial vessels were hunting illegal activity. Being less than legal itself, ''Redeye'' was among those arrested.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
